name: @abtree/srp-refactor
description: Score the codebase for Single Responsibility violations, snapshot the initial scoring, pause for the human to pick one to tackle, refactor it in a bounded loop (re-scoring after every pass), do a multi-agent code review, and finish with a before-vs-after change report.

scripts.test:clean-on-first-pass: claude --model sonnet 'abtree execution create ./node_modules/@abtree/test-tree "Run tests/clean-on-first-pass.yaml against ./main.json"'
scripts.test:clean-on-second-pass: claude --model sonnet 'abtree execution create ./node_modules/@abtree/test-tree "Run tests/clean-on-second-pass.yaml against ./main.json"'
